DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS JUDICIAL COUNCIL OF CALIFORNIA & STEVE JAHR'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed, and the demurrer papers include grounds that cannot be cured by amendment. Order signed in open court. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
